events.text: Assessment complete — this is a stop-work condition. The staged arc-rated PPE's cal/cm² rating (per its DOC/ID tags) doesn't meet the incident energy category on the equipment's arc-flash label, so the ensemble wouldn't adequately protect against a potential arc-flash event. I wrote the full findings, corrective actions, and rationale to `/app/answer.json` with `decision: fail` and `risk: critical`.
